comment: VACATION-PREP domain slice: the away window plus changes that land while the
family is gone. Dates are day_offsets from IClock.Today (generic-clock rule).
pending_updates mirrors the guests.json shape: each carries an
activation_day_offset and surfaces when the simulated week reaches it.
Seeded with one believable material change — a delivery arriving to an empty
house — so vacation prep has an adaptation beat, not just a static plan.

pending_updates.description: A parcel delivery is scheduled while the house is empty
